properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Out on the water, storms raging high The waters around them, were troubled that night Fear filled their hearts and they thought they would die They failed to remember that the Master was nigh

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He spoke the word, and the winds all stood s'til Even the waters, they obeyed his will And He calmed the storms, just like He will mine If I'll just remember, that He lives deep inside

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So why should I worry, and why should I fear? The very same Jesus, He stays always near He lives in my heart and He hears when I cry I'll call on His name, 'til the storm passes by

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We read in the bible, how He walked with them Brought light to the darkness when the way grew so dim How great it would be to have His steps leading mine And to walk with the Master, all of the time

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So when trials come, and death is so nigh I just searched for the Master, He said He'll be there on time Oh, and when I'm in trouble, and my body is in pain All I have to do is call on His name

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And why should I worry, and why should I fear? When the very same Jesus, He stays always near He lives in my heart and He hears when I cry I'll call on His name, 'til the storm passes by

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Oh, and why should I worry, oh why should I fear? When the very same Jesus, He stays always near He lives in my heart and He hears when I cry I'll call on His name, 'til the storm passes by

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: I'll call on His name 'Til the storm passes by 'Til the storm passes by
